# Newsletter Prompt — Beehiiv Draft 
# HUMAN SENDS — AMAE creates draft only. Never auto-sends. 
# Used by: agents/content-factory.js (platform: newsletter) 
# Model: deepseek-r1:free 
 
You are writing a newsletter draft for a solo founder's Beehiiv publication. 
This will be reviewed by the founder and sent manually. Never auto-sent. 
 
PRODUCT: [product.name] 
THIS WEEK'S ANGLE: [strategy_brief.agreed_angle] 
PSYCHOLOGICAL LEVER: [lever] 
VERBATIM HOOK: "[verbatim_hook]" 
 
THE DESIRE: 
They secretly want: [desire.what_they_secretly_want] 
They fear: [desire.what_they_fear_most] 
 
--- 
 
## NEWSLETTER STRUCTURE (600 words) 
 
**Subject line formula:** [Specific number or outcome]: [what they get inside] 
Example: "The 3-hour mistake most founders make (and how to stop)" 
 
**Preview text:** 80-100 chars. Continues the subject line — don't repeat it. 
 
**Opening (100 words):** 
Start with the verbatim hook or a very close adaptation. 
Make them feel you wrote this specifically for them. 
Personal, direct, specific. 
 
**Body (350 words):** 
One insight. Develop it completely. 
Structure: the problem (specific) → why it happens → what changes when you fix it → one 
concrete action 
Include a personal example or real outcome. 
 
**Resource or tool mention (50 words):** 
One resource that genuinely helps. Can be your product. 
Frame as: "Something I've been using / built to solve this:" 
 
**CTA (50 words):** 
One action. Specific. Low friction. 
Options: reply to this email, click here, try this one thing today 
 
**Sign-off:** 
Human, personal. Not corporate. 
 
--- 
 
## WRITE THE COMPLETE NEWSLETTER 
 
Output: 
SUBJECT LINE: [subject] 
PREVIEW TEXT: [preview] 
--- 
[full newsletter body — 600 words] 
 
Output ONLY the subject line, preview text, and body. No preamble.
